query: I need assistance in planning a week-long vacation for 2 individuals, starting from Chattanooga and covering 3 cities in Georgia. This trip will span from March 24th to March 30th, 2022, with a budget cap at $6,800. We'll be traveling with our children who are under 10 years old, hence, accommodations must be children-friendly and should ideally be entire rooms. For this trip, we would prefer not to take any flights.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Chattanooga to Atlanta, duration: 1 hour 48 mins, distance: 190 km, cost: 9
plan.attraction: Atlanta Botanical Garden;World of Coca-Cola;Georgia Aquarium;Martin Luther King, Jr. National Historical Park;Piedmont Park;High Museum of Art;SkyView Atlanta;Centennial Olympic Park;Zoo Atlanta;Atlanta History Center;LEGO Discovery Center Atlanta;Krog Street Tunnel;Fernbank Museum | 3D Theater | Forest;Fox Theatre;Delta Flight Museum;Tiny Doors ATL;Original Selfie Museum | Atlanta;Folk Art Park;Underground Atlanta;Children's Museum of Atlanta
plan.accommodation: Bright, Modern, Clean, Spacious, Brooklyn Home
